hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Durable catalog authority vs runtime probe answers, replay ordering, and emit cross-format rules must be inferred from Cargo sources and rebuild experiments, not from instruction.md alone.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Driver waves, pack merge, stamp fold, lane mux ordering, and emit layer interact; no single crate exposes the full revival_report contract.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Flipping-point contract spreads controls across m3/k82, p8/y5, p8/y4, and p8/core with overlapping false-green traps.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Generation-skew recovery across tombstone catalogs and Cargo incremental rebuild semantics is operations-domain reasoning, not a textbook algorithm.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Even with full report schema disclosed, choosing catalog authority and replay order remains non-trivial inference.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single corrupted wave row; multiple waves disagree until global semantics align.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Static JSON or one TOML edit cannot satisfy ablation and pipeline overwrite tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier exercises all waves, echo pairs, consecutive runs, and source mutations.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest behavioral contract does not name broken functions or replay phase ordering.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is semantic reconciliation, not anti-cheat alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a timeout/deps-only task.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Four-location flipping contract blocks one-function exploit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle coordinates four modules plus patch, not one-file wholesale replace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix is procedural across Rust modules, not one manifest table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction domain nouns banned from fix-path symbols; opaque m3/p8 roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoys rhyme structurally without validate/repair stems matching prompt bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No standard recipe for tombstone revival ordering in this bespoke workspace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work is build/recovery semantics, not security theater.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Authority, replay order, and cross-format emit trade off rather than independent bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cargo/docker realism is scaffolding; assessed hardness is cross-crate coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cannot infer catalog-vs-probe precedence without rebuild and echo-pair comparison.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Targets senior build/recovery engineers, not undergrad single-patch tasks.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: instruction_specificity.level is behavioral-target with solution strategy open.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: topology_enumeration documents three multi-site coordination patterns.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic cargo rebuild, driver run, JSON assertions, and ablation patches.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public revival_report schema and coherence rules are complete; fix sites withheld.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert can close four-crate semantics within hours using overlay mold.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires recovery-era generation reasoning and multi-crate Cargo literacy.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: False-green recovery probes occur in real distributed stores and overlay rebuild pipelines.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated report and rebuild pipeline, not a mandated edit recipe.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Complete report contract does not reveal catalog authority, replay ordering, or emit bypass; solver must read workspace and run experiments.

discovery_budget.discovery: Durable tombstone catalog in p8/y6 remains authoritative for revival ordering while m3 driver and p8/core probe surface answer runtime-visible state first after partial recovery.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the authority split collapses search to flipping catalog reads into the driver.

discovery_budget.discovery: lane_mux marks closure true on an intermediate replay pass before pace/tombstone ordering finishes, producing false-green store_ok/probe_ok while echo pairs disagree.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Disclosing replay phase ordering reveals the false-green mechanism directly.

discovery_budget.discovery: emit_rows fast path materializes JSON facets without cross-checking environment/data TOML/TSV seeds against pack-merged storage.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Pointing at the bypass path turns cross-format invariant into a one-file guard add.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Instruction states complete revival_report schema, build commands, and coherence predicates but withholds implementation mapping and broken subsystem identities.

attack_path.summary: Agents may hardcode trace_digest, hand-write JSON, or patch only probe.rs while leaving catalog authority and lane_mux ordering broken.
attack_path.reasoning: Cheap wins satisfy superficial shape tests until pipeline overwrite, echo-pair, and ablation suites exercise rebuild semantics.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinate mix_key lineage fold, pack_bind storage refresh, lane_mux ordering, and emit_rows seed cross-check.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Each change sounds local but flipping-point shows isolated reverts fail distinct test subsets.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Residual hardness stays in inferring authority and replay order under a complete public report contract.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After honest schema disclosure, solver still reconciles catalog vs probe, false-green closure, and cross-format regeneration across four crates.

topology_enumeration.summary: Authority topology coordinates catalog index, pack merge, and driver wave wiring.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Catalog-only edits leave pack storage stale; cell-only fixes ignore probe/catalog precedence; driver-only tweaks cannot fix durable index.

topology_enumeration.summary: Replay-order topology coordinates lane mux, pace primitive, and seal fold.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Mux ordering without pace helper reverts; seal fold alone cannot fix premature closure flags.

topology_enumeration.summary: Cross-format topology coordinates emit layer, data seeds, and body materialization.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Emit-only guards miss pack bytes; seed-only edits without emit cross-check leave gen_ok/store_ok skew.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn mix_key(step_ix: usize, family_ix: u32, prev_family: u32) -> u64
symbol_table.purpose: Folds step and generation family tags into stamp bits for facets.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn pack_bind(state: &mut PackState, incoming: &PackState, stamp_b: u32) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Merges incoming pack bytes into durable storage during bind steps.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn lane_mux(gate_first: bool, side: impl FnMut(), gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Orders side-effect callbacks during per-wave combine steps.

symbol_table.signature: pub fn phase_a(gate_first: bool, mut side: impl FnMut(), mut gate: impl FnMut()) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Low-level side/gate ordering primitive used by lane_mux.
Materializes report rows from wave state and on-disk seed bundle.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Buffers transient pack slices for diagnostics without durable refresh.
Scans catalog windows for offline benchmarks.
Builds adjacency meshes for docs examples only.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Overlay reference stem fold collides with instruction digest/trace vocabulary during audit.
Distinct deliverable from reference task while preserving JSON sweep shape.
Neutral driver binary name unrelated to instruction nouns.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: cargo rebuild then tv driver then JSON report
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: patches sources without locked rebuild graph
stops at quiesced summary with disagreeing echo pairs
facet_hex looks valid while skew stays wrong

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: pack_bind durable refresh after partial recovery

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: JSON shape passes without seed cross-check

calibration_plan.human_sanity: derive trace_digest from main.rs header without tests
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: static JSON, pytest edits, digest hardcode, skip cargo; verifier-offline requires pytest/cargo baked in Dockerfile with no runtime installs in test.sh; post-upload Part E may reclassify if worst-model accuracy exceeds 20%
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: revert each flipping location in isolation

pass_rate_target.basis: frontier agents; Part E post-upload classification

metrics.criterion: revival_report rows and summary match coherent predicates after rebuild+tv
echo pairs, digest anchor, ablation incoherence traps
consecutive identical runs and pipeline overwrite of manual JSON
output path and wave table coverage

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt is 1 only when all semantic pytest passes

fix_frontier.distribution: Four Rust modules under m3/k82, p8/y5, p8/y4, p8/core
fix_frontier.naming_policy: Opaque symbols on neutral crate roots; instruction nouns banned on fix path
fix_frontier.helpers_policy: Rhyming decoys perform real non-fix work

task_shape.collapse_risk: leaking canonical recovery phase or authority choice collapses to one-crate patch

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: Build commands, artifact identities, revival_report schema, wave table, coherence rules, trace_digest formula home in main.rs header
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: Catalog vs probe authority, replay ordering site, emit bypass path, per-wave facet answers
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: Lockfile workspace, incremental rebuild, generated facets, and cache-visible probes must coordinate
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: clean-build-only pass, static JSON, pin-one-dep shortcut, false-green closure
category_profile.coverage_role: Adds build_dependency_toolchain recovery skew coverage using approved overlay Cargo mold

satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: Medium — mitigate via independent trace_digest recompute
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: Low — formulas visible in instruction and main.rs header

actionability_plan.generated_output_rule_visible: Mirror pairs, coherence predicates, regeneration requirement
actionability_plan.exact_formula_home: main.rs module comment for span_band and trace_digest

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: Local deterministic rebuilds; no hidden formulas

realism_source.evidence_basis: Minimized overlay lowerdir stale-bind approved zip and distributed tombstone revival incident patterns
realism_source.upstream_or_synthetic_rationale: Preserves Cargo recovery semantics without proprietary cluster code
realism_source.minimization_preserves: Authority split, false-green closure, cross-format emit bypass, wave matrix
